title: Visual Poster AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Reference Role: Use Image 1 only as the child identity reference and preserve the child face, smile, hair shape, age impression, and natural expression. Theme: Premium birthday poster for MUNONYE, centered on a carved age number 2. Subject: A happy toddler from the reference photo, wearing milky white T-shirt and pink denim overalls, laughing naturally while face, shoulder, one hand, and one foot extend outside the number for a realistic 3D pop-out effect. Number Stage: The large number 2 is carved into premium off-white luxury paper-textured wall, with visible depth, inner shadows, and realistic paper texture. Decor System: Inside the number, arrange soft pink and ivory balloons with white flowers, subtle floral details, and bouquet styling with premium celebration styling. Typography: Put MUNONYE, CHAPTER 2, and 365 MORE DAYS OF WONDER cleanly on the wall with luxury magazine-cover spacing. Lighting: Warm cinematic side sunlight, soft rim light, natural skin texture, sharp studio detail, realistic shadows. child reference: Image 1 toddler birthday portrait. Restrictions: Fully clothed family-safe birthday portrait, no distorted child anatomy, no fake tree shadows, no random text, no watermark, no cheap party clutter.
